name: Pfeffern#sse
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon ground cloves (optional, for stronger taste)
Juice and grated rind of 1 lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the flour and sift with baking powder, salt, and spices.
2. Gradually add sugar to the beaten eggs and stir in lemon juice and grated lemon rind.
3. Mix in dry ingredients and chopped nuts until well combined.
4. Refrigerate for 2 hours.
5. Roll out dough to 1/2-inch thickness and cut into 3/4-inch round cookies using a cookie cutter.
6. Place cookies on an ungreased baking sheet and let them stand overnight at room temperature.
7. Just before baking, place a drop of brandy on each cookie.
8. Bake the cookies in a preheated oven set to 300°F for 30 minutes, turning off the heat.
9. Allow the cookies to cool completely before transferring them to a tightly covered jar.
